caribbean.headline: Nassau Faces Rainy Conditions
caribbean.paragraph: Nassau is experiencing windy and rainy conditions with max winds forecast at 17 kt and significant wave heights of 2.8 ft, while Martinique is seeing lighter winds at 11 kt. I expect the rainy weather to impact both ports, with a 70% chance of rain in Nassau, making for a wet day in the Caribbean.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Increase
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing northwest winds of 27 kt and wave heights of 7.3 ft, with a 68% chance of rain, while Haifa is seeing lighter conditions with winds of 19 kt. I expect these conditions to impact marine activities in the Eastern Mediterranean, particularly for small crafts near Mykonos, which may need to exercise caution due to the elevated wind and wave conditions.
